violations.text: The front door to the outside, located in the dinning area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by small droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door lowboy freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
Outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of bread racks. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The floors throughout back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Inspector observed bread buns with rodent gnaw marks. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
Inspector observed a bag of bread buns with rodent gnawed marks.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnaw marks of food product and droppings in storage area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
Inspector observed bags of bread with gnawed marks and rodent droppings.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnaw marks and droppings throughout kitchen area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front dining area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep counter bottom shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The floors and floor drains throughout the kitchen and storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
The (walls ) in the (storage) area is in poor repair. Observed gaps and holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Inspector observed bags of bread with gnawed marks and rodent droppings.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The presence of (rodent) is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings, gnawed bread, and nesting materials in back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front dining area), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep counter bottom shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The floors and floor drains throughout kitchen and storage has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (veggie slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

(Packaged Ham ) was observed held at (50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food carts, food storage shelves under prep counters ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Inspector observed a leak at the pipes in walk in cooler. Per PIC, work order was submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The floors throughout kitchen and walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue, ice buildup, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The (walls) in the (3 bays sink) area is in poor repair. Observed missing or damaged tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (lettuce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Food contact surfaces of (ice machine) were observed with black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Faucet at 3 bay sink was observed to be leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
